style_effects: Subtle heat haze curls around Electabuzz's metallic joints, revealing distorted reflections of the battlefield in its polished armor. Glowing blue energy pulses rhythmically through its seam lines, casting sharp blue-white light that illuminates metallic dust particles swirling in slow motion. The aura is a cool, intense blue halo with sharp, geometric edges, radiating a crisp, electric energy. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
